originalTitle: Framework has good news and bad news
summary: Thanks to the component crisis, it's a bad time to want a new computer. But if you are waiting on a preorder for the Framework Laptop 13 Pro - which Framework's CEO has called the "MacBook Pro for Linux users" - the company shared good news on Thursday that might mean yours will cost less […]
content: Thanks to the component crisis, it’s a bad time to want a new computer. But if you are waiting on a preorder for the Framework Laptop 13 Pro — which Framework’s CEO has called the “MacBook Pro for Linux users” — the company shared good news on Thursday that might mean yours will cost less than you expected. The company announced that it has secured cheaper new PCIe Gen 5 SSDs from its supplier, Adata, and if you had put in an order for a configuration with a 500GB SSD, you’ll now get a 1TB SSD at a lower price. Framework also said you can also now order configurations with the new 1TB or 2TB SSDs onboard, though I’m not seeing them in the DIY configurator yet. But Framework has some bad news, too. The company says that it has “gotten signals that CPU pricing will be increasing soon,” so it expects that it will have to “adjust the overall system price on Framework Laptop 13 Pro in the coming weeks for new orders.” Not a great sign for the component crisis, which has already led to major price increases across tech hardware, including some also announced on Thursday for Apple devices and Xbox consoles. Framework initially announced the Laptop 13 Pro in April and originally planned to ship the first units in June. The company recently delayed those initial shipments to July due to issues with the laptop’s haptic touchpad and its custom display.
chineseTitle: 框架有好消息和坏消息
chineseSummary: 由于组件危机，现在不是想要一台新电脑的好时机。但是，如果您正在等待 Framework Laptop 13 Pro 的预订（Framework 的首席执行官将其称为“Linux 用户的 MacBook Pro”），该公司在周四分享了好消息，这可能意味着您的成本会更低 [...]
chineseContent: 由于组件危机，现在不是想要一台新电脑的好时机。但如果你正在等待 Framework Laptop 13 Pro 的预订（Framework 的首席执行官将其称为“Linux 用户的 MacBook Pro”），该公司周四分享了好消息，这可能意味着你的价格将低于你的预期。该公司宣布已从供应商威刚 (Adata) 处获得了更便宜的新型 PCIe Gen 5 SSD，如果您订购了 500GB SSD 配置，您现在可以以更低的价格获得 1TB SSD。 Framework 还表示，您现在还可以订购带有新的 1TB 或 2TB SSD 的配置，尽管我还没有在 DIY 配置器中看到它们。但 Framework 也有一些坏消息。该公司表示，它“收到了 CPU 价格将很快上涨的信号”，因此预计将不得不“在未来几周内针对新订单调整 Framework Laptop 13 Pro 的整体系统价格”。对于零部件危机来说，这并不是一个好兆头，这场危机已经导致科技硬件价格大幅上涨，其中包括周四宣布的苹果设备和 Xbox 游戏机的价格上涨。 Framework 最初于 4 月份发布了 Laptop 13 Pro，原计划于 6 月份发货第一批设备。由于笔记本电脑的触觉触摸板及其定制显示屏出现问题，该公司最近将首批发货推迟到 7 月。
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于 AI 与科技趋势信号，适合用于观察工具选型、产品机会、开发者关注点和技术路线变化。
